General.Name: Great China Properties Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Great China Holdings (Hong Kong) Limited, an investment holding company, engages in property development and investment business in the People's Republic of China. The company sells and manages real estate properties. It also operates a resort. The company was formerly known as Great China Properties Holdings Limited and changed its name to Great China Holdings (Hong Kong) Limited in July 2022. Great China Holdings (Hong Kong) Limited was incorporated in 1954 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
